channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: Expert discusses Stryker cyber attack
item.description: Stryker, a major medical supply company based in Portage, announced its systems were disrupted by a cyber attack. Leon DuPree, a part-time lecturer with Eastern Michigan University's College of Engineering & Technology discusses the attack and how companies and people can protect themselves.
